verse.name: v1
verse.lines: From bethlehem's manger came forth a stranger, on earth I long to be like Him; My faithful Saviour, How rich His favor! On earth I long to be like Him.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I want to walk like Jesus, I want to talk like Jesus, On earth I Iong to be like Him; All thru life's journey from earth to glory I only ask to be like Him

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: To be like Jesus, To be like Jesus, On earth I Iong to be like Him; All thru life's journey from earth to glory I only ask to be like Him

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Serene and Holy, obedient, slowly, On earth I long to be like Him; By grace forgiven, an heir of heaven, On earth I long to be like Him.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: To love like Jesus, To love like Jesus, On earth I Iong to love like Him; All thru life's journey from earth to glory I only ask to love like Him
